docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,500.00 FILED BY CCSF / TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, MALIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SARAH HEYWORTH FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF / TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-24-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAWN PAYNE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE (SARAH HEYWORTH) IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MALIA BROWN IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. VISITING JUDGE: TAMILA IPEMA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MALIA BROWN IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
